registry_refs.notes: Registry rank 29; the current seed points to the Bulletin on yalejreg.com.
Local WordPress sitemap records /bulletin/, /print/, and the site root, with onboarding status paused_waf after Cloudflare 403 preflight responses.

publication_scope.notes: The main print journal is expected under /print/. The separately named /bulletin/ route must remain a distinct supplement/serial scope until accessible evidence supports a different decision.

evidence.notes: User-agent * has an empty Disallow rule, the policy specifies Crawl-delay: 10, and it advertises https://www.yalejreg.com/sitemap_index.xml.
The bounded onboarding preflight received a Cloudflare Attention Required challenge page. No retry or challenge bypass was attempted.
The bounded onboarding preflight received a Cloudflare Attention Required challenge page. No retry or challenge bypass was attempted.

reconnaissance.notes: Onboarding is paused at the access gate. Robots permits crawling subject to a ten-second delay, but both publication-scoped seeds were blocked before archive, issue, article, metadata, selector, or PDF evidence could be collected.

include: The Yale Journal on Regulation print-edition collection under https://www.yalejreg.com/print/
Print-journal issues and article landing pages once exact routes are observed
Primary article PDFs attributed to the print journal once delivery is validated
exclude: The Yale Journal on Regulation Bulletin under /bulletin/ pending a separate scope decision
Notice & Comment, blogs, mastheads, administrative pages, and unrelated WordPress content
Cloudflare challenge, login, account, search, and analytics routes
Any file or article whose attribution to the print journal cannot be established
scope.notes: The current registry seed favors /bulletin/ for PDF density, but that is not evidence that Bulletin holdings should be merged into the ranked print journal. Keep the scopes separate during recovery.

entry_points.notes: Intended main-journal seed; currently blocked by Cloudflare.
Separate Bulletin seed recorded locally; currently blocked and not a substitute for print-journal enumeration.

nodes.notes: Expected print-edition archive; layout and pagination are unobserved because the route returns a challenge.
Expected Bulletin archive; layout and relationship to the print journal are unobserved because the route returns a challenge.

Configured separate seed only; no child URL pattern has been observed.

pagination.termination: Unknown until an authorized client can load the archive without a Cloudflare challenge.
pagination.notes: Do not infer WordPress pagination selectors from platform identity alone.

pagination.termination: Unknown until an authorized client can load the archive without a Cloudflare challenge.
pagination.notes: Bulletin should be investigated separately from the print archive.

layout_eras.notes: The local sitemap declares WordPress, and robots responses carry WordPress/WP Engine signals, but publication-page HTML was not available for selector or era analysis.

validation.notes: No PDF link was discoverable because both scoped archive pages were blocked before article traversal.

robots.notes: No paths are disallowed for user-agent *, but every future request must honor Crawl-delay: 10.

barriers.notes: Cloudflare challenge pages prevent publication-scoped archive access, selector discovery, metadata sampling, and the required one-PDF onboarding smoke.

access.politeness_notes: The bounded preflight checked robots first, recognized the ten-second crawl delay, stopped after Cloudflare challenges on the two scoped seeds, and made no challenge retries, article requests, PDF requests, bulk crawl, or bypass attempt.

verdict.summary: The canonical yalejreg.com host is a WordPress site whose robots policy permits crawling with a ten-second delay, but Cloudflare challenges currently block both the print and Bulletin archive seeds. No trustworthy archive graph, selector set, metadata provenance, or PDF path can yet be recorded.
blockers: Cloudflare returns HTTP 403 challenge pages for both publication-scoped archive seeds.
The ranked print journal and the Bulletin remain unresolved as separate acquisition scopes.
No oldest, middle, or newest issue sample and no article page is available.
No representative PDF link or file response has been validated.
verdict.next_action: Keep onboarding status paused_waf. After an operator-approved cooldown, retry once from an authorized browser or allowlisted network while honoring the ten-second crawl delay; if the print archive loads, map archive/issue/article selectors and validate exactly one representative PDF before changing status.
verdict.implementation_notes: Do not modify production routing or mark the journal active from platform inference alone. When access is restored, seed /print/ for the ranked journal, investigate /bulletin/ separately, and record observed selectors and pagination before adapter smoke.
